content:
Taurus November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Recommit to the bond, revalue the worth
Key Dates Venus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 7th house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 4th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (2nd house)
Love Scorpio New Moon in your 7th house is the year’s biggest partnership fresh start — and it’s your opposite sign’s New Moon
Career 2nd house Gemini Full Moon is a money and self-worth climax; the home and foundation amplify at Mars conjunct Jupiter
Crystal of the Month Obsidian
Lucky Colors Deep black, glossy onyx, forest green
Lucky Number 2
Affirmation I recommit to the bond I’ve reviewed; I revalue the worth I’ve earned.

This Month’s Energy

Taurus, November 2026 turns October’s partnership review into recommitment. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing the retrograde season — and for you, Venus is your ruler, so the release is especially meaningful. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — your opposite sign’s New Moon, the year’s biggest fresh start around a significant bond. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo, your 4th house of home, family, and inner foundation — a major home or family moment. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 2nd house of money, body, and self-worth — a climax around what you earn, own, and value. November’s pattern: recommit to the bond early, revalue the worth late.

Key Dates for Taurus in November 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Taurus Do / Avoid
Nov 8 New Moon in Scorpio (your 7th house — opposite sign) 7th house — fresh start in partnership, marriage, contracts; your opposite sign’s New Moon is the year’s loudest relationship new beginning Do: commit to the partnership, mend the significant tie, sign the contract
Avoid: holding back from a recommitment that’s been waiting
Nov 13 Venus + Mercury station direct Station day — the retrograde season ends; for Taurus (Venus-ruled), this is especially meaningful. Clarity returns Do: move forward on what’s been waiting, sign the agreement
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16 Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo 4th house — home, family, inner foundation amplify; a major property, move, or family moment peaks Do: move the home, mend the family tie, organize the foundation
Avoid: forcing a property decision you haven’t researched
Nov 24 Beaver Full Moon in Gemini 2nd house — climax around income, possessions, body, self-worth; a long-building money or value matter matures Do: claim the raise, set the price, name your worth, address the body’s needs
Avoid: undervaluing the work or impulsive big-ticket spending
Nov 22 Sun enters Sagittarius 8th house season — intimacy, shared resources, psychological depth through late December Do: address the intimacy, renegotiate the shared account, deepen the trust
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources
Early Nov Mars moves through Leo (your 4th) Home, family, foundation stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the home momentum Do: clear the home, mend the family tie, organize the foundation
Avoid: picking a fight at home you don’t mean to finish

Career & Money

For Taurus, November’s money story climaxes at the 2nd house Full Moon. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 falls in your 2nd house of income, possessions, and self-worth — a climax around what you earn and value. With Venus (your ruler) direct from November 13, the path is clear.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 7th house) handles the partnership-led work — clients, contracts, working alliances. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 4th house on November 16 may shift the work-from-home balance. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 8th house) on November 22 opens the shared-finance season. Crystals for wealth can support the push; the practical move is recommit to the bond early, revalue the worth late.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 in your 7th house of partnership is the love signature of the month — Scorpio is your opposite sign, and a New Moon here is the year’s loudest relationship new beginning. After October’s Venus retrograde review, this is the green light for recommitment.

Venus (your ruler) stationing direct on November 13 deepens the release of the review. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 4th house on November 16 amplifies home-rooted love — moving in, renovating, or family expansion. Crystals for love can support the recommitment; the deeper practice is letting the bond meet the truer self October surfaced.

Health & Wellness

November’s wellness story emphasizes the throat, thyroid, neck, and the body’s relationship to value. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 2nd house) asks for gentle throat care and self-worth rhythms. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 4th house on November 16 asks for home-based rest and family-system balance.

Obsidian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, protection, the release of old patterns, and truth-telling — a useful symbolic companion for a Venus-ruled earth sign emerging from a retrograde season. Taurus often carries tension in the neck, throat, and shoulders; gentle neck stretches, warm food, and slow home-cooked meals are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Obsidian

Why Obsidian fits Taurus this month. You are Venus-ruled — your reflex is beauty, comfort, slow accumulation. November asks you to do Scorpio-season depth work (your 7th and 8th houses) while staying grounded through a partnership recommitment and a home expansion. Obsidian — volcanic glass, deep black — is traditionally tied to truth-telling, the release of old patterns, and grounded protection. Where Rose Quartz would soften and Smoky Quartz would gently shield, Obsidian cuts through. Perfect for the 7th house Scorpio New Moon (recommit to the bond) and the 2nd house Gemini Full Moon (revalue the worth).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Obsidian at your front door or the foundation of your home on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Carry it during any partnership or money conversation through November 24.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 2nd house — hold Obsidian at your root for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the worth you’re reclaiming and the truth you’re telling.

Read more: Obsidian Meaning and Best Crystals for Taurus.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Taurus — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 2nd house.
Crystal: Obsidian.
Intention: Recommit to the bond; revalue the worth it carries.

  1. Cleanse Obsidian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Place it at your front door or the foundation of your home through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three bonds you’re recommitting to — and the worth you’re ready to claim at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: set the price, name the worth, claim the value. Obsidian in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Taurus New Moon in May 2027 (your 1st house again): how has the recommitment matured through the winter? Hold Obsidian during the review.

Shop Taurus Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Taurus crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, truth, partnership, and self-worth — including the Obsidian that cuts through to clarity after a retrograde season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Taurus November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Taurus?

It’s a recommit-and-revalue month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 7th house — opposite sign) is the year’s biggest partnership fresh start. Venus (your ruler) and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 2nd house) revalues the worth.

How will the Venus stationing direct on November 13 affect Taurus?

Venus is your ruling planet — its station direct, alongside Mercury, releases the retrograde season with extra weight. Relationship, money, and self-worth matters that have been under review can finally move forward.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Taurus?

It falls in your 2nd house of income, possessions, body, and self-worth — a climax around what you earn and value. Claim the raise; set the price; name your worth.

What is the best crystal for Taurus in November 2026?

Obsidian — it cuts through to clarity and truth, exactly what a 7th house Scorpio New Moon (recommit to the bond) plus a 2nd house Gemini Full Moon (revalue the worth) demand after a Venus retrograde. See the full Taurus crystal guide →

Why is the November 8 Scorpio New Moon in my 7th house so significant?

Scorpio is your opposite sign — a New Moon here is the year’s loudest relationship new beginning, falling directly on your partnership axis. After October’s Venus retrograde review, this New Moon is the green light for recommitment.
